suite.name: suite S1779540186522 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should Be Redirected To Home Page
Main Page Should Be Displayed
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//div[@class='inventory_list']' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@class='inventory_list']' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@class='inventory_list']' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//div[@class='inventory_list']' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@class='inventory_list']' did not appear in 10 seconds.

test.name: TC_002 Add Product To Cart

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

test.name: TC_003 Complete Checkout Process

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

Main Page Should Be Displayed

kw.name: When User Adds Product To Cart
And Cart Should Display The Product
Then Confirmation Message Should Be Displayed
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@class='inventory_list']' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then Error Message Should Be Displayed
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get Error Message
Get Text
kw.msg: ${message} = Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: ${error_text} = Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Test Cases for Sauce Demo Application
